COMMON: [gold][font_size=28][b]Common:[/b][/font_size][/gold] The most frequent potions found in the Spire.
RARE: [gold][font_size=28][b]Rare:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Unique and powerful potions which are rarely seen.
SPECIAL: [gold][font_size=28][b]Special:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Potions which are obtained from events or created by other means.
UNCOMMON: [gold][font_size=28][b]Uncommon:[/b][/font_size][/gold] Stronger potions which appear less often than common potions.
